page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.7xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local NVMe storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates that the single-core performance of the Intel Xeon 8163 processor is relatively weak, scoring in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench single-core tests. However, the 32 dedicated cores deliver average multi-core performance, as evidenced by middle-tier results in multi-threaded stress-ng, Geekbench multi-core, and bzip3 decompression benchmarks. Memory bandwidth remains stable in the middle 50% tier, with read-only large block speeds reaching 87.55 GB/sec and write speeds at 43.49 GB/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.sn2.7xlarge offers a balanced resource density suitable for workloads that benefit from parallel processing but do not require high single-threaded performance. The lack of local storage and GPU acceleration makes it less suitable for heavy database operations or deep learning training. Instead, it is best suited for multi-threaded general-purpose workloads such as static web serving, software compilation, and moderate Redis database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.7xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps, with no local storage or GPU acceleration. Performance benchmarks show weak single-core execution but average multi-core capabilities, making it highly capable for parallelized tasks. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provides a balanced resource profile for general-purpose workloads. It is best suited for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, software compilation, and moderate Redis deployments that do not require high single-threaded speed or local SSD storage.

tagline: A balanced multi-core virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and 128 GB RAM for parallelized general-purpose workloads.

128.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Average multi-core performance suitable for parallel processing tasks
Best suited for static web serving, software compilation, and Redis operations
